evidence_items.summary: GitHub PR pytest-dev/pytest#14407 cherry-picks PR #14382 (community fix) onto branch 9.0.x. Diff: 3 files (changelog/14381.bugfix.rst, src/_pytest/config/__init__.py, testing/test_helpconfig.py); 15 changed lines. Production change: counter for the early fast-path in main() now sums --version + -V occurrences instead of only --version.

Test testing/test_helpconfig.py::test_version_less_verbose is parametrized over flag in ["--version", "-V"]. Both runs assert: result.ret == ExitCode.OK and result.stdout.str().strip() == f"pytest {pytest.__version__}". A clean pytest run on this scope at head_sha 480809ae demonstrates -V no longer loads plugins.

intent_summary: Phase 6.1'b auto-generated bundle for case_id seed_008_pytest_dev_pytest_14407 (https://github.com/pytest-dev/pytest PR #14407, head_sha 480809ae). Claim C.cli_version_flag.repair_needed (type repair_needed); test_scope testing/test_helpconfig.py::test_version_less_verbose.
